If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me analyze each fix:

### Fix 1 Analysis (Line 79 - Button variant type change)
The `Button` on line 79 uses `variant={ButtonVariant.link}`. The type change is that `'stateful'` was added to the union. The value `'link'` is still valid in the new type. **No code change needed** ã `ButtonVariant.link` is still a valid variant value.

### Fix 2 Analysis (EmptyState Family Migration)
There are two `<EmptyState>` usages in the file:

**First EmptyState (lines 33-40):** Already partially migrated ã uses `<EmptyStateHeader>` with `titleText`, `headingLevel`, and `icon` props. In v6, `EmptyStateHeader` and `EmptyStateIcon` are removed. The `titleText`, `headingLevel`, and `icon` props should be moved directly onto `<EmptyState>`.

- `titleText={title}` ã moves to `<EmptyState titleText={title}>`
- `headingLevel="h4"` ã moves to `<EmptyState headingLevel="h4">`  
- `icon={icon && <EmptyStateIcon icon={icon} color={color} />}` ã In v6, `icon` prop takes a component/element directly. The `EmptyStateIcon` wrapper is removed. This becomes `icon={icon}` but we need to handle the `color` styling. Actually, looking at the v6 API, `icon` on `EmptyState` accepts a `ReactNode`. So we can pass the icon element directly. But `EmptyStateIcon` is deprecated. The icon prop should receive the icon component directly or a rendered icon element.

Looking at the child-to-prop strategy: `EmptyStateIcon` ã `icon` prop on `EmptyState`. So `<EmptyStateIcon icon={SearchIcon} />` becomes `icon={SearchIcon}` on EmptyState. For the first usage with color, `icon={icon && <EmptyStateIcon icon={icon} color={color} />}` ã since EmptyStateIcon is removed, we need to render the icon directly. The `icon` prop on EmptyState in v6 takes a `ReactNode`, so we can pass `icon && React.createElement(icon, { color })` or use JSX. Let me handle this carefully.

**Second EmptyState (lines 71-84):** Uses old v5 pattern with `<EmptyStateIcon>` and `<Title>` as direct children. These need migration:
- `<EmptyStateIcon icon={SearchIcon} />` ã `icon={SearchIcon}` prop on `<EmptyState>`
- `<Title size="lg" headingLevel="h4">{title}</Title>` ã `titleText={title}` and `headingLevel="h4"` props on `<EmptyState>`
- `<EmptyStateBody>`, `<EmptyStateFooter>`, `<EmptyStateActions>` are valid v6 children

Let me also check what needs to happen with imports after the changes.

After migration:
- `EmptyStateHeader` ã no longer used ã remove import
- `EmptyStateIcon` ã no longer used ã remove import  
- `Title` ã no longer used ã remove import
- `EmptyStateActions`, `EmptyStateBody`, `EmptyStateFooter` ã still used ã keep

For the first `BaseState` component with `color` prop and conditional icon, in v6 the `icon` prop on EmptyState takes a `ReactNode`. We can render the icon inline as JSX. Since `icon` is a `ComponentType`, we need to render it. Let me use JSX to create the element with the color style.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 ã Button variant type change (line 79)
**No change needed.** The type change only *adds* `'stateful'` to the union. The existing value `ButtonVariant.link` (`'link'`) remains valid in the new type. No code modification required.

### Fix 2 ã EmptyState Family Migration (lines 34, 72, 73)
**Applied.** Two `<EmptyState>` usages were migrated from v5 to v6 composition:

1. **First EmptyState (BaseState component, lines 33ã40):**
   - Removed `<EmptyStateHeader>` wrapper ã moved `titleText={title}` and `headingLevel="h4"` directly onto `<EmptyState>`.
   - Converted `<EmptyStateIcon icon={icon} color={color} />` (child-to-prop) ã `icon={IconComponent && <IconComponent color={color} />}` prop on `<EmptyState>`. Renamed the destructured `icon` parameter to `IconComponent` so it can be used as a JSX component tag (React requires uppercase).

2. **Second EmptyState (NoResultsMatchFilter, lines 71ã84):**
   - Removed `<EmptyStateIcon icon={SearchIcon} />` ã moved to `icon={SearchIcon}` prop on `<EmptyState>`.
   - Removed `<Title size="lg" headingLevel="h4">{title}</Title>` ã moved to `titleText={title}` and `headingLevel="h4"` props on `<EmptyState>`.
   - Kept `<EmptyStateBody>`, `<EmptyStateFooter>`, `<EmptyStateActions>` as valid v6 children.

3. **Import cleanup:**
   - Removed `EmptyStateHeader` (no longer used).
   - Removed `EmptyStateIcon` (no longer used).
   - Removed `Title` (no longer used).
   - Kept `EmptyStateActions`, `EmptyStateBody`, `EmptyStateFooter`, `Button`, `ButtonVariant`, `EmptyState`, `Spinner`.

   - Converted `<EmptyStateIcon icon={icon} color={color} />` (child-to-prop) ã `icon={IconComponent && <IconComponent color={color} />}` prop on `<EmptyState>`. Renamed the destructured `icon` parameter to `IconComponent` so it can be used as a JSX component tag (React requires uppercase).

2. **Second EmptyState (NoResultsMatchFilter, lines 71ã84):**

   - Removed `<Title size="lg" headingLevel="h4">{title}</Title>` ã moved to `titleText={title}` and `headingLevel="h4"` props on `<EmptyState>`.

### Fix 2

Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: EmptyStateActions

Component <EmptyState> has a new prop `titleText` (type: `React.ReactNode`) added in v6 that accepts JSX content.

This prop may be intended to receive content that was previously passed as children. Review the JSX children of <EmptyState> and determine if any should be moved to the `titleText` prop.

Example migration:
  Before: <EmptyState>{content} other children</EmptyState>
  After:  <EmptyState titleText=>other children</EmptyState>

Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>
